articles.title: Ethereum Pectra Upgrade: Here’s Everything That Will Change
articles.description: The Ethereum blockchain ecosystem is gearing up for one of its biggest upgrades, Pectra. During a virtual developer meeting on Thursday, Ethereum’s core team officially announced that the upgrade is targeted for release in mid-March. articles.description: Bitcoin has yet to relinquish its dominance in this market cycle, leaving many investors still holding onto hopes for the arrival of an altcoin season.
